name: anamnesis
description: Activation-gated associative memory recall injection for Codex, backed by anamnesis.

interface.shortDescription: Activation-gated associative memory recall for Codex.
interface.longDescription: anamnesis injects, on each prompt, only the memories whose spreading-activation clears a need-odds threshold (read-only, top-k capped), and seeds session start with high-salience project memory. Reinforcement is agent-driven. Backed by the anamnesis cognitive memory engine over a warm on-demand daemon.
defaultPrompt: Recall what we already decided in this project before I start.
What prior context is relevant to what I'm working on now?
